title: crepidomanes scandens
intro: Crepidomanes scandens, also known as the climbing forked polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepidomanes scandens include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also sometimes used in traditional Asian medicine to treat respiratory and skin conditions.
